programme.title: Survivorman
programme.desc: Leopards, snakes, territorial honey bees and the infamous Royal Bengal tiger all pose threats to Les survival.

programme.title: Survivorman
programme.desc: From over 200 applicants, Joe McConnell was selected to join Les on a very difficult survival expedition.

programme.title: Les débatteurs de Noovo
programme.sub-title: Pour ou contre l'augmentation des frais de scolarité pour les étudiants en provenance de l'extérieur du Québec?
programme.desc: Nos débatteurs : Victor Henriquez, Antonine Yaccarini, Déborah Cherenfant et Jacinthe-Eve Arel.

programme.title: Les débatteurs de Noovo
programme.sub-title: Devrait-on devancer la date limite pour le changement de pneus d'hiver au 1er novembre?
programme.desc: Nos débatteurs : Victor Henriquez, Jacinthe-Eve Arel, Déborah Cherenfant et notre invité Robert Poëti.

programme.title: Les débatteurs de Noovo
programme.desc: Nos débatteurs : Meeker Guerrier, Catherine Beauchamp, Maude Goyer et Danny St Pierre.

programme.title: Les débatteurs de Noovo
programme.sub-title: Bacs vert, bleu, brun et consignes : est-ce qu'on en demande trop aux citoyens?
programme.desc: Nos débatteurs : François Lambert, Antonine Yaccarini, Geneviève Pettersen et Alex Perron.

programme.title: Les débatteurs de Noovo
programme.sub-title: Le projet de tramway de Québec devrait-il faire l'objet d'un référendum?
programme.desc: Nos débatteurs : Victor Henriquez, Jacinthe-Eve Arel, Déborah Cherenfant et Rodolphe Husny.

programme.title: Les débatteurs de Noovo
programme.sub-title: Grève dans le secteur public : les écoles devraient-elles être un service essentiel?
programme.desc: Nos débatteurs : Meeker Guerrier, François Lambert, Victor Henriquez et Geneviève Pettersen.

programme.title: Les débatteurs de Noovo
programme.sub-title: Administration municipale: les voyages d'affaires devraient-ils être réservés aux élus?
programme.desc: Nos débatteurs : François Lambert, Meeker Guerrier, Justine McIntyre et Robert Poëti.

programme.title: Les débatteurs de Noovo
programme.sub-title: Devrait-on rendre gratuits les transports en commun au Québec?
programme.desc: Nos débatteurs : Geneviève Pettersen, Patrick Bonin de Greenpeace Canada, Déborah Cherenfant et Justine McIntyre.

programme.title: Les débatteurs de Noovo
programme.sub-title: Devrait-on interdire l'écriture inclusive dans les communications officielles?
programme.desc: Nos débatteuses : Maude Goyer, Catherine Beauchamp, Jacinthe-Ève Arel et l'enseignante et chroniqueuse en éducation Claudine Potvin.

programme.title: Les débatteurs de Noovo
programme.sub-title: Don de sperme : le Canada devrait-il rémunérer les donneurs pour mieux encadrer la pratique?
programme.desc: Nos débatteurs : Me Anne-France Goldwater, Dr Alain Vadeboncoeur, François Lambert et Déborah Cherenfant.

programme.title: Les débatteurs de Noovo
programme.sub-title: Hausse des événements haineux : devrait-on interdire les manifestations en lien avec le conflit Israël-Hamas?
programme.desc: Nos débatteurs : Geneviève Pettersen, Rodolphe Husny, Alex Perron et Antonine Yaccarini.

programme.title: Les débatteurs de Noovo
programme.sub-title: Est-ce le rôle du gouvernement de subventionner le sport professionnel?
programme.desc: Nos débatteurs : François Lambert, Antonine Yaccarini, Ray Lalonde et Meeker Guerrier.

programme.title: Les débatteurs de Noovo
programme.sub-title: Doit-on rentrer dans un moule pour faire de la politique?
programme.desc: Nos débatteurs : Victor Henriquez, Antonine Yaccarini, Geneviève Pettersen et Jacinthe-Eve Arel.

programme.title: Les débatteurs de Noovo
programme.sub-title: Fraudes bancaires : est-ce que les banques nous protègent assez?
programme.desc: Nos débatteurs : François Lambert, Catherine Beauchamp, Victor Henriquez et Alex Perron.

programme.title: Les débatteurs de Noovo
programme.sub-title: Croyez-vous que la grève permettra aux employés de l'État d'améliorer leurs conditions de travail?
programme.desc: Nos débatteurs : François Lambert, Antonine Yaccarini, Déborah Cherenfant et l'enseignante et chroniqueuse en éducation Claudine Potvin.

programme.title: Magic in the Moonlight
programme.desc: In this romantic comedy, a British skeptic (Colin Firth, "A Single Man") falls in love with a spiritualist medium (Emma Stone, "Easy A") whom he hoped to debunk.

programme.title: Guncrazy
programme.desc: California teen Anita Minteer (Drew Barrymore) struggles in the face of an absentee mother, her mom's abusive boyfriend, Rooney (Joe Dallesandro), and a lack of respect from her classmates. This all changes when a pen-pal school project connects her with convict Howard (James LeGros). Anita secures Howard's parole and violently squares off against Rooney after he rapes her. Soon enough, the gun-crazy teen is on the run with Howard, with his parole officer (Michael Ironside) in pursuit.

programme.title: My Mom's New Boyfriend
programme.desc: Henry Durand (Colin Hanks) is a young FBI agent who is given a difficult assignment: spy on his mother (Meg Ryan) and her boyfriend (Antonio Banderas) who is suspected of leading a gang of art thieves.

programme.title: My Other Mother
programme.desc: When gruff and independent Candy meets her stubborn birth mother, will the two manage to open their hearts?

programme.title: Avalanche (1999)
programme.desc: The survivor of an Alaskan avalanche, Dr. Lia Freeman (Caroleen Feeney) is an environmentalist concerned about a similar disaster occurring if a proposed new oil pipeline is built. Freeman adamantly warns the planners of the likelihood of a major avalanche, but they ignore her pleas. As she realizes that a massive whiteout is imminent, Freeman tries to get the citizens of a nearby town to leave, aided by brave helicopter pilot Neal Meekin (Thomas Ian Griffith).

programme.title: Cyber Tracker (Syndicated)
programme.desc: In the future, a Secret Service agent becomes the target of the seemingly indestructible Cyborg Executioners.

programme.title: Rough Air: Danger on Flight 534
programme.desc: A reluctant co-pilot is forced to take command of a passenger plane after the captain is severely injured.

programme.title: Operator
programme.desc: Chaos ignites when the daughter of a veteran 911 operator and her estranged husband are held captive.

programme.title: Bouquet d'amour
programme.desc: Passionnée de botanique, Violet tient une boutique de fleurs qu'elle a héritée et rencontre Jack, avocat et passionné de fleurs.

programme.title: L'amour sous le citronnier

programme.title: Tickled
programme.desc: After stumbling upon a bizarre “competitive endurance tickling” video online, wherein young men are paid to be tied up and tickled, reporter David Farrier reaches out to request a story from the company. But the reply he receives is shocking—the sender mocks Farrier's sexual orientation and threatens extreme legal action should he dig any deeper. So, like any good journalist confronted by a bully, he does just the opposite: he travels to the hidden tickling facilities in Los Angeles and uncovers a vast empire, known for harassing and harming the lives of those who protest their involvement in these films. The more he investigates, the stranger it gets, discovering secret identities and criminal activity. With humor and determination, Farrier and co-director Dylan Reeve summon up every resource available to get to the bottom of this tickling wormhole. Directed by David Farrier

programme.title: Revenge
programme.desc: Matt and Froy take the opportunity to enact revenge on Ronnie and Carlos a repo at a car wash gets out of hand Lou's big mistake on a repo results in a debtor bringing the fight to their front door in a shoot out.

programme.title: Wrench in the Works
programme.desc: First, a wrench is thrown in the works, and at the car, when Froy and Matt try to repo from a plumber. Then, the duo go out again to try to repo a car from a slap-happy debtor, but unfortunately the car has a boot on it. And finally, Froy, Matt, Lyndah, and Sonia head out to the ranch to repo a tractor from some pushy ranch hands.

programme.title: Breakdowns and Beatdowns
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a bad part of town to find that their target car is owned by bat-equipped gang bangers. Then, a seemingly friendly teacher and an assistant principal nearly come to blows when Froy and Sonia come around to repossess one of their vehicles Then, And finally, after the tow truck breaks down on the side of the road, Lou, Matt, and Froy are left with no options and stuck in the middle of a violent dispute between some gun-wielding neighbors.

programme.title: Broken Bones and Broken Phones
programme.desc: First, Froy, Lou, and Matt wrestle a group of body builders when going after a Jeep Commander. Next, an unemployed stock broker gets a rude awakening when Lou and Lyndah wake him up inside his car. And finally, Froy learns why you should never text and not drive to pick up Sonia, because she breaks his phone in two.

programme.title: Smut Campaign
programme.desc: After Ronnie suffers a near-fatal wound during an attack on the lot, he reconsiders his role in the repo business.

programme.title: Should Have Seen This Coming
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy unfurl an elaborate sting when they repo a taxicab by tricking its driver into picking them up. But what to do with his ferociously inebriated client?

programme.title: Go Kart Them Away
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy repossess a car from a cheating husband who's shacked up at a nearby motel. His wife probably isn't going to be too happy to hear about this. Then, Sonia and Lyndah crash a high school reunion to confront an over-the-hill jock and his pack of angry cougar cheerleaders. And finally, Lyndah reveals her plot for the whole team to work together and repossess an entire truckload of souped-up go karts.

programme.title: The New Boss
programme.desc: Lou has retired, making Sonia the new boss, but will she be able to keep the company going without her big brother?? Matt and Ronnie try to take a car away from of yuppie with an unusual taste for red meat.

programme.title: Segway This Way
programme.desc: First, Matt and Sonia hit the beach to repossess an old-fashioned classic surfer car from an old-fashioned surfer looking for a classic tussle. Then, Froy and Matt stretch their wits to identify and take down an uncooperative Segway renter. Hopefully, one of them knows how to ride that thing. And finally, Lou, Lyndah, and Froy crash a house-party to claim a Civic from an out-of-control wannabe gangster.

programme.title: Repo Basher vs. Matt
programme.desc: Matt, Froy, and Lou get a tip on a car whose owner has a boyfriend known for taking his fists to repossessors. Then, Lou and Matt derail an international expedition when they haul off with a tourist bus. And, Sonia and Froy bring some unwanted heat to a promotion for an energy drink by trying to repo the marketing truck.

programme.title: The Final Showdown
programme.desc: After Froy bails him out from a Tijuana prison, Matt is on the warpath, and somebody needs to pay. Is this just the end of their business, or is it also the end of their friendship? Then, Lou and Sonia get an order for a typical vehicle repossession. There's only one problem: it belongs to somebody who is like family to them.

programme.title: Captain Lou
programme.desc: First, Lyndah and Matt interrupt a debtor's bicycle ride to repossess his Jeep, but when Matt's buttons get pushed, some bikes might get broken. Then, Froy and Sonia negotiate with a sensible debtor who's more trouble than she seems... or is she? And finally, Lou, Sonia, and Froy hit the open water to repo a luxury yacht - but first they'll have to wrangle with a surly sea captain, not to mention the Coast Guard.

programme.title: M.I.A. & D.E.A
programme.desc: When Matt and Froy go missing, Sonia is on a mission to figure out what they've got up their sleeves.

programme.title: Traffic Jammin'
programme.desc: The team gets back to work, but have their anger management sessions had any effect? Sonia and Lyndah confront a gang of roller derby girls who've got the skills to protect their car.

programme.title: Playing the Role
programme.desc: First, Lou devises a plan to have Froy and Sonia pose as house buyers, and a happy married couple, meanwhile Matt and Lou will hook and book. Then, Matt and Froy wrangle with an out-of-work actor who's lost track of the line between his identity and his latest role. Finally, Froy and Lyndah need to figure out how to get a car from an angry owner, and the competing repo company that got to the job first.

programme.title: Steve Geyer: Twice as Old as I Used To Be
programme.desc: Beginning as a nightclub comic, Steve Geyer found faith traveling the circuit and then recognized the opportunity to make people laugh with clean comedy.

programme.title: Ty Barnett
programme.desc: Ty Barnett, a Chicago native, got his start at Seattle's Comedy Underground. Whoopi Goldberg called Ty “hilarious” and reviewers have said he is “thought provoking” and “edgy”. All this praise earned him many television appearances. He hosted the Food Network's Mealin' and Dealin', Discovery Family's Babies Behaving Badly and Beasts Behaving Badly, and appeared in over 15 national commercials. It all began when he was one of the two finalists on the most-watched and Emmy nominated season of Last Comic Standing. Ty went on to multiple Tonight Show appearances where Jay Leno called Ty “one of the funniest comedians working”. He also appeared in HBO's Bad Boys of Comedy, his own Comedy Central Presents and one-hour special Issues. Ty was named “one to watch” by the Hollywood Reporter. He's also been seen on the sitcoms Samantha Who, Til Death, Life in Pieces, NickMom Night Out and Tosh.O. His comedy album, Grown Man-Baby Steps is a favorite on Sirius XM.

programme.title: Leland Klassen
programme.desc: Raised on a farm in the heart of Canada, Leland quickly learned that shoveling manure and weeding potatoes, although lucrative, wasnít his passion in life. So with absolutely no clear direction or vision for his future, he did what everyone does when they find themselves in that position - he went to University. He wisely chose his classes based on whichever cute girl happened to catch his attention and after several short years of last minute cramming and late assignments, Leland graduated from the University of Saskatchewan with a degree in Anthropology. As you might have guessed, Lelandís university education opened many doors for him in the years to come, but for some reason he was dissatisfied working for a courier as a night shift stock boy. By this time married and with his first child soon on the way, the most responsible and obvious choice was, of course, to pursue a career in the entertainment industry. Starting off at amateur nights and seedy bars Leland decided right from the beginning that he would remain clean despite what everyone else was doing and as a result over the last 16 years Leland has become recognized as Canadaís premier clean comedian. With his unique intelligence and wit, Leland has carved out quite a niche for himself in the world of entertainment. Using his farm boy charm and handsome (although somewhat inbred) Mennonite good looks, Lelandís clever observations and rich life experiences are brought to life in a one-of-a-kind show. LELANDíS CREDITS: Halifax Comedy Fest 2014, Just for Laughs in Montreal, 1999, 2001, 2004 and 2014, Host of Popcorn TV, Featured on Thou Shalt Laugh 5, Host of Comedy Tournament, Co-Host GMA Canada 2009, 2012 and 2013, Promise Keepers Canada, Episode of the US syndicated comedy series ìBananasî, Two of his own television seriesí on the West Coast, as well as Appeared on numerous other programs across the United States and Canada, such as Comedy Network, CBC Television, YTV, Star TV, Global and Discovery Kids.

programme.title: Max Dolcelli
programme.desc: New York comedian Max Dolcelli uses his cynacism and enigmatic stage presence to riff on Waze, Dollar Store pregnancy tests, and how horrible toys were when he was a kid.

programme.title: Moody Molavi
programme.desc: The christian comic is married to his high school sweetheart, who later became his stepsister through the marriage of their parents to each other. That's where the fun begins as Moody skillfully shares his life experiences.

programme.title: Jason Hewlett
programme.desc: The Award-Winning One-Man Show of Jason Hewlett The Entertainer will have you laughing until it hurts. Comedy, Music, Impressions, and Standing Ovations make Jason the perfect entertainer. His brand of Hilarious G-Rated Entertainment is unlike anything you have ever enjoyed. Over 2,000 shows for more than 1 Million audience members in his incredible career make Jasonís show an event you will remember for years to come.

programme.title: Chris Voth
programme.desc: Chris Voth is an accomplished comedian, a licensed teacher, and a published author. Voth made his debut late-night television appearance on the Late Late Show with Craig Ferguson. He also appeared in three seasons of NBC's Last Comic Standing and was chosen for the prestigious Great American Comedy Festival. A 15-year comedy veteran, Voth is a past winner of the Denver Comedy Works Competition and has worked with everyone from Dave Chappelle to Larry the Cable Guy to Linda Ronstadt. Voth's first comedy CD titled "Never Mind the Jim J Bullocks, Here's the Chris Voth" is currently available for purchase. Chris currently balances his performance schedule with his full-time high-school teaching career. You can read his short story, "Stand Up and Deliver," published in the Cream City Review Literary Journal. In it, Chris shares the experiences he had when entering the teaching field after years in stand-up comedy.

programme.title: Dwight Slade
programme.desc: Part man, part ageless boy comedian Dwight Slade has the privilege of being a comedy legend in American stand up. The winner of this year's Boston Comedy Festival, Slade combines an intelligent, raging voice of justice with the snickering attitude of a high school prankster. He gives the impression of a man on a journey. Who enjoys nothing more than making fun of everything along the way. Born in Seattle, Dwight moved often in his early years, living in San Mateo, California Wilton, Connecticut Marietta, Georgia and Houston, Texas.

programme.title: Mark Christopher Lawrence
programme.desc: Mark Christopher Lawrence (born May 22, 1964) is an American character actor, stand-up comedian, and voice-over artist. He is perhaps best known for his role as esoteric D.J., Tone Deaf, in the 1994 satirical rap mockumentary, Fear of a Black Hat. He has co-starred in popular films such as Terminator 2: Judgment Day, Planet of the Apes, Lost Treasure and The Pursuit of Happiness. Lawrence can currently be seen in his regular role as Big Mike on the NBC series Chuck. He has made guest appearances on many television programs, most notably Heroes, My Name Is Earl, Crossing Jordan, Dharma & Greg, Malcolm in the Middle, Touched by an Angel, Malcolm & Eddie, Men Behaving Badly, Seinfeld, Murphy Brown, and Martin. He is also featured on the Radio Series Adventures in Odyssey as "Ed Washington".

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: The North Atlantic Ocean is generous with her bounty, until she takes a life in return. Mark braves the deep seas on the most dangerous day of the lobster fishing season.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Into the Core
programme.desc: One year after witnessing a record number of deadly twisters in Tornado Alley, Mark & Jaclyn return to the Midwest in search of more extreme storms. The hunt challenges their relationship with Mother Nature, as well as with each other.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Costa Rica
programme.desc: Costa Rica is a tiny country jammed with diversity and adventure. George explores the volcanoes of Costa Rica with an international team of scientists, rafts down whitewater rivers in full flood, canyoneers down raging waterfalls, and handles some of deadliest snakes this tropical country has to offer.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Highway to Hail
programme.desc: George and three side-kicks head straight into the “Bearcage”, looking to get beat up by the biggest, baddest hailstones that Texas and Oklahoma can throw at them. They find it – and their stormchasing vehicles don't look too pretty after coming through these massive storms.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Arctic Winter
programme.desc: George links up with two experienced polar adventurers to explore the frigid Canadian arctic in the depths of winter. The team first uses skis to cross the fractured sea ice of Frobisher Bay, then dog teams to head north through the spectacular Auyuittuq Mountains.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Eco-Disasters
programme.desc: No-one creates eco-disasters on quite the scale of the former Soviet Union. In Uzbekistan, the Aral Sea, once one of the largest freshwater lakes in the world, has seen its waters diverted, so that it has shrunk to 1/6 its previous size. In Crimea, a mountain has been carved into a james bondian submarine base. In northern Ukraine, the Chernobyl nuclear site has been reduced to a radioactive wasteland.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Space
programme.desc: We break the bounds of earth, and look at the environment of space. We examine the difficulties and challenges of exploring this most challenging environment.↵ ↵George experiences some of the extreme training needed for space travel –aboard a Czech-built Albatross fighter jet, the Zero-G plane, and a centrifuge producing 6 G's of force, and witnesses the launch of a flight to the International Space Station.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Polynesian Volcanoes
programme.desc: Filming the volcanoes, mudpools and geysers in the geothermic wonderland of New Zealand's north island, we learn that a new island is being created by an undersea volcano 1000 miles north in Tonga. Determined to be among the first to see this “newest land on earth”, we head for the remote island by plane and boat, after various nautical mishaps, George ends up, bedraggled and clad in nothing but underwear and a lifejacket, honored to be one of the very first to explore this brand new island.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Under Pressure
programme.desc: It's dark, it's cold, there is no air to breath and everything is under extreme pressure. George begins his exploration of the deep with a well-preserved shipwreck in the st.lawrence River, then heads west to dive with undersea explorers Chris Harvey-Clark and Phil Nuyyton, and investigate the newly discovered “Black Smoker” deepsea vents. The show climaxes in Curacao, where we dive to 1000 feet aboard Nuyyton's newest submersible.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Antarctica
programme.desc: George returns to the “Fin Del Mundo” at the southern tip of Argentina, this time to sail on a Russian icebreaker to Antarctica. After braving the stormy Drake passage, he explores volcanic Deception Island, camps out in the Antarctic snow, and paddles a kayak through icebergs calved off the melting glaciers.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Babies love animals, and now you can bring animals from the seven continents home to your baby. programme.title: Baby Einstein

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Einstein: Let's Learn About Animals in the Water
programme.desc: Discover the wonderful world of water and deep dive into all the amazing creatures that call the ocean home. programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Baby Mozart is an introduction to Mozart's beautiful music, which has been proven to have positive affects on people of all ages, especially babies. Images of brightly colored toys and known objects aid in the audio presentation of child-friendly arrangements and sound effects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Lullaby Time: Soothing Sounds for Baby
programme.desc: One of the greatest joys you'll ever experience is bonding with your baby during those calm, quiet moments. Lullaby Time: Soothing Sounds for Baby provides comforting sights and sounds as you relax and share this precious downtime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As babies continue to explore the world around them, they soon encounter many creatures, both large and small, that are extremely intriguing. Whether furry or feathered, winged or wiggly, bumpy or smooth, each holds a special fascination. Neighborhood Animals exposes little ones to animals most likely to be found close to home or in easily recognized environments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Discover the exciting world of shapes and colors! Learn about the primary colors red, yellow, and blue with real-life imagery of animals and objects. Explore colors like purple, orange, and green and see artwork by Van Gogh! Discover the circles, squares, and triangles that surround us in everyday life, and introduce baby to the world of visual arts as children and artists create their own work!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Learn all about music and rhythm in the world around us! Discover classical music and learn instrument names through narration and repetition. Inspire sweet dreams with gentle melodies and a comforting bedtime story. Learn about classical music from Beethoven, Bach, and Mozart. Sing and dance along to classic rhythmic songs like The Wheels on the Bus and see real-life images of instruments.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building some traffic calming measures. Bob has been working all night laying lino.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Spud The Dragon / Pilchard Steals The Show
programme.desc: Bob is insulating Mrs. Potts' loft. Wendy is building an enclosure for the local dog show.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a 'hide' for the bird-watching society. / Wendy is planning a picnic, when Mr Ellis calls.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Wendy's Removal Service / Mr Beasley's DIY Disaster
programme.desc: Bob is carrying out a loft conversion at a new home. / Bob is building a lean-to for Mr Beasley's allotment.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Bob's Egg And Spoon Race / Trix's Tiles
programme.desc: The whole town is practicing for an egg and spoon race. / Bob is tiling a roof.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Mr Sabatini's Smashing Day / Roley To The Rescue
programme.desc: Bob is rendering a wall for Mr Sabatini. / After a stormy night Wendy has to mend a chimney pot at Mrs Potts'.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Wendy's Magic Birthday / Bob's Egg And Spoon Race
programme.desc: It is Wendy's birthday, but she doesn't want any fuss. / The town is practicing for an egg and spoon race.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Mr Beasley's New Friends / Spud The Pilot
programme.desc: Bob is repairing a leaking water tank at school. / Bob is installing an antique fireplace for Mrs Percival.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Trix and the Otters / Speedy Skip
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles wants a fence built around his compost heap. / Bob is replacing a potting shed for Mr Beasley.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Bob and the Goalie / Dizzy Goes Camping
programme.desc: Bob is building a new exercise park. Farmer Pickles has decided to open a camp site on his land.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The Mayor asks Bob to build a Pets Corner in a local park. / A burst pipe outside Mr Sabatini's needs fixing.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Lofty's Long Load / Hamish's New Home
programme.desc: Bob is making a through-lounge at the Bentleys'. / Mr Fothergill has a nasty case of dry rot.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Bob The Photographer / Mr Bentley's Trains
programme.desc: Bob goes to Farmer Pickles farm to take some photographs. / Mrs Bentley asks Bob to build a new model railway.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Wendy's Big Night Out / Racing Muck
programme.desc: Bob and Wendy are converting a shop into a restaurant. / Bob is building a new swimming pool for the Mayor.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Mr Beasley's Noisy Pipes / Lofty's Jungle Fun
programme.desc: Mr Beasley's pipes are making banging noises./ Bob and the gang build a pedestrian crossing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's the first day of spring in Strawberryland, at least it's supposed to be, but with the cold winds blowing and frost on the ground it looks as though spring isn't going to come this year.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: One windy day, a tiny fairy named Sherry Bobbleberry gets blown into Strawberry's open window. She is a klutzy little thing who is convinced she will always be a major goof-up.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The Berry Blossom Festival is underway and everyone in Strawberryland is having a Grand Time, thanks to the selfless efforts of Strawberry Shortcake: she's really giving this festival all she has!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: There's someone...or something strange in the neighborhood and the kids imagine the worst - but Strawberry finds it's a new girl, Blueberry Muffin.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberryland's one movie theatre goes out of business, Strawberry has an idea to save it: she and her friends can film a movie to show there and attract crowds back to the theatre.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: Where, Oh, Where Has Our Blueberry Gone?
programme.desc: Blueberry has become obsessed with the mystery book detective heroine, Patti Persimmon. She decorates her store with Patti posters and rearranges her shelves to make room for all the Patti books she's ordered. Blueberry begins to neglect outings with her friends and even goes so far as to dress like her idol just to emulate her. She then starts looking for cases to solve around town.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While in the midst of a cake decorating demonstration at the café, the girls are uncharacteristically interrupted by an excited Princess Berrykin. She announces the Berrykins have decided to revive the old tradition of the Berry Bitty Buggy Derby. While the girls enthusiastically recount the stories they've heard about it and ask the Princess questions, Blueberry, carrying enough books to block her view, comes through the door and unknowingly interrupts the Princess.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry's friend Coco Calypso lives on Seaberry Beach with her pet, Papaya Parrot, and a band of fun-loving monkeys.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake is planning a first birthday party for her sister Apple Dumpling, so she sets off on an adventure to find the perfect party supplies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's a retelling of "Sleeping Beauty" - but our focus is on the fairy that didn't get her invitation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's winter and the pond's frozen and that means Strawberry and friends can ice skate! They decide to showcase their talents at an Ice Dance Show. But just then, a new kid named Apricot shows up.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake has always dreamed of seeing a certain rare flower, which only blooms once every ten years - and then only for a day!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake travels to magical Holidayland with Honey Pie Pony, searching for the perfect presents to give her friends.

programme.title: HappyKids
programme.desc: HappyKids

programme.title: Too Much Noise!
programme.desc: Maybe he has super powers! Sid explores his sense of hearing, and discovers that sounds travel through the air and into our ears. So it turns out Sid doesn't have super powers, he was just blocking sound waves from entering his ears!

programme.title: Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: When a storm causes a giant boulder to cut off Berry Bitty City's water supply, Strawberry and the girls face the possibility of having to move away from their homes. With the help of Mr. Longface Caterpillar, the girls set out on an adventure to save their town.

programme.title: Blippi's Special Delivery
programme.desc: After receiving a letter from a fan, Blippi learns how mail travels from one person to another.

programme.title: HappyKids
programme.desc: HappyKids

programme.title: Dance Puppy Dance
programme.desc: When a simple tune Cherry composes goes viral on the Berryweb, Cherry quickly gets fed up with everyone listening to this song, everywhere, all the time. She goes to comic lengths to get some peace so she can compose the song she's suppose to write for the Queen of Berryvania.

programme.title: The Berry Big Harvest
programme.desc: Finding she has some free time one morning, Strawberry visits Berrykin Bloom who is filled with excitement over his new crop of Berry Bitty fruits and vegetables his garden has never grown so much produce! He can't wait to share his new crop (the perfect bitty size) with Berry Bitty City, so Strawberry volunteers to help him transport the produce to Orange's General Store. Soon Orange's store is overflowing with Berry Bitty Fruits & Veggies. It's the berry first time Orange has not been able to find a “place for everything” in her store.

programme.title: Playback
programme.desc: Ghost Girl, a bounty hunter who works for SOL Technologies, holds an interview with two reporters recounting all the events that have transpired concerning the evil Knights of Hanoi and the mysterious Playmaker.

programme.title: An Invitation
programme.desc: Ghost Girl challenges Yusaku to a Speed Duel with some heavy stakes. If she wins, she gets to capture Ai. If Yusaku wins, he gets a window into SOL's server to learn more about the incident that still haunts him.

programme.title: Blippi The Musical
programme.desc: Blippi The Musical brings the lively Blippi from the screen to the stage in an exciting live show. Recorded in Nashville, TN, the performance features 14 songs, including favorites like "Do the Blippi Dance," "Brush Brush Your Teeth," and "Monster Truck." Your Blippi fan will enjoy learning about the world while singing and dancing along with this special show. There's so much to explore—it'll make you want to sing and shout!

programme.title: Room at the Top
programme.desc: Strawberry is really touched when her girlfriends and the Berrykins volunteer to help her with the construction of her new marketplace, so when the girls suggest they take charge of designing Strawberry's dream-bedroom to go on the second story, of course Strawberry agrees. While construction is going on, the girls each show Strawberry their individual ideas for the bedroom. Grateful for the support and not wanting to dampen anyone's enthusiasm, Strawberry tells each of them yes (actually, more like not-no).

programme.title: Starlight, Star Bright
programme.desc: With time running out before the Grand Opening celebration for the new Marketplace, Strawberry's friends get the idea to invite her favorite singer, superstar CHERRY JAM, to be the guest singer. The girls are blown away when their berryjuice cell phone gets a text message that Cherry accepts their invitation! Strawberry is touched by their surprise, but reminds them that now the town and Marketplace really have to shine! The girls and Berrykins rush to turn the Marketplace Café into a suitable performance area for a big star like Cherry Jam.

programme.title: Blippi's Alphabet and Transportation Adventures
programme.desc: Join Blippi on a series of exciting educational journeys where he uncovers the Case of the Missing ABCs, explores the charming Ranch at the Pier, and delves into London's rich transportation history at both the Transport Museum and the RAF Museum. From solving puzzles and meeting farm animals to discovering vintage buses and historic airplanes, Blippi makes learning an adventure filled with curiosity and fun.

programme.title: ducktv
programme.desc: ducktv favorites are the most popular ducktv shows, representing different educational values. Just to name a few, the series Mimo and Bobo develops social skills, Fireteam fosters problem- solving, while Shaping Up promotes shape and color identification.

programme.desc: The learn with ducktv section presents ducktv shows with a strong educational aspect. The episodes of this category teach first concepts, music and art, stimulate imagination and creativity, and develop cognitive skills.

programme.title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures - Pac's Very Scary Halloween - Part Two: The insidious brain-in-a-jar Doctor Pacenstein has stolen Pac's body and stuck our hero's grey matter (yellow matter, actually) in a jar!

programme.title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures - New Girl in Town: When Spheros' and Betrayus' teenage niece visits Pacopolis, she and Pac become smitten.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: Skylanders Academy - Missing Links: The Skylanders are having trouble coming together as a team, so sensei King Pen is recruited by Eon to show them how to "create a Skylander".

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: Skylanders Academy - Dream Girls: Stealth Elf has her mind manipulated by new villain Dreamcatcher.

programme.title: Bakugan Geogan Rising
programme.desc: Bakugan Geogan Rising - The Mascot Cat! / The AB's Grand Adventure!: Lightning's favorite steak house is in trouble! A new sushi restaurant is stealing away all their customers. / The Awesome Brawlers head to the Los Volmos Coliseum to try their luck at the new Medieval Adventure game.

programme.title: Bakugan Geogan Rising
programme.desc: Bakugan Geogan Rising - The Taste of Memories / Virtual Brawl: When Ajit mentions that one of his earliest memories is eating lentil curry, the other ABs decide to surprise him by making some. / Benton Dusk is helping the AB train for the Judgement Battle with his new virtual reality simulator.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - Fighting for a Friend, Part 2: Decked out in high-tech body armor and weapons, Valon pummels Joey with punishing punches. Can Joey outthink the computer before it's too late?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - Fighting for a Friend, Part 3: Decked out in high-tech body armor and weapons, Valon pummels Joey with punishing punches. Can Joey outthink the computer before it's too late?

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: Street Sharks - Shark Fight: Rox returns for the Fission City Music Awards and plans to reveal proof of Dr. Paradigm's gene-slamming experiments.

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: Street Sharks - Sky Sharks: Mr. Cunneyworth lets Dr. Paradigm mutate him into Repteel, a mix of electric and moray eel. Ordered to steal a supercomputer part, he is pursued by the Sharks.

programme.title: Kitty Is Not a Cat
programme.desc: Kitty must learn what it is like to be a cat.

programme.title: Rainbow Rangers
programme.desc: Rainbow Rangers - Missed Them by a Hare: Climate change causes snow (the natural camouflage of a family of Snow Hares) to melt prematurely, leaving them vulnerable to predators. / The Rangers have to save a bear cub stuck on the side of a mountain.

programme.title: Crown Control
programme.desc: The dream chasers stumble upon the fabled Crown of Control with surprising ease, thanks to an unexpected encounter with the King of the Creatures.

programme.title: The Promised Crown Affair
programme.desc: Izzie has vanished into the dream world, and the dream chasers struggle to maintain normalcy in the waking world while secretly searching for her.

programme.title: Friends Reunite
programme.desc: Olly about how his obsession is affecting their relationships. Olly refuses to see the damage he's causing, but it becomes clear that he's lost touch with what really matters.

programme.title: All Of Nothing
programme.desc: The ninja and Sensei Wu try to infiltrate the Serpentines' inner sanctum and walk right into a trap, and when Lloyd's rescue mission fails, there is only one person who can help them, namely the evil Lord Garmadon – but can they trust him?

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Maximum Overload
programme.desc: Spider-Man and Marvel's Super Heroes take on a mischievous Loki and a team of super villains in an all-new LEGO adventure

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: The CHI Jackers
programme.desc: The Wolves have become strong because of the stolen CHI. And now they are stealing even more. Soon all the other tribes of CHIMA have none. Laval and Eris must find a new, clever and “Wolf proof ” way to get CHI to the tribes.

programme.title: Symptoms!
programme.desc: Owen falls prey to the toxin of a poisonous prehistoric jungle flower and believes he's a raptor.

programme.title: Snow Way
programme.desc: Practicing for the local snow lodge's big snowboard race, Mia has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no biggie, but when she tries to resume practice, the normally fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! At the local snow lodge's Snowboard Meet, ace snowboarder Mia, trying to raise money for a new Heartlake City animal shelter, enters the fiercest race of all – the Boardercross. Then, while practicing, she has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no big deal, but once she heals and tries to resume practice, the usually fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! With the help of her Friends, she tries hard to overcome her fear, but her nightmarish visions of snowboard monsters and jeering snowmen have her shaking in her bed. She backs out of the race, disappointing her Friends and herself. Finally, when an avalanche traps Fiona, Mia is forced to overcome her fears and race to the rescue.

programme.title: The Shape of Motion
programme.desc: Arin's quest to find his parents takes an unexpected turn when he and the Ninja stumble upon a baby dragon in need.

programme.title: Enter the City of Temples
programme.desc: Breaking into the heavily guarded City of Temples, they must prove their worth to secure a spot in the tournament.

programme.title: Legacy, Vehicle and Mechs
programme.desc: Zane takes help from Nya for backup memories of their adventures to the Samurai X Cave computer, but Zane encounters a mysterious puzzle buried deep within his code. Nya digitizes Jay and uploads him into Zane's mind. Jay reviews memories of the Ninja's various motorcycles, mechs and planes in order to solve the vehicle-themed puzzle.

programme.title: Spit Take!
programme.desc: A Dilophosaurus runs loose in the park's hotel, and Owen and Claire must find it before the guests notice - and before Vic's dino-hunting security team can damage the hotel and the guests.

programme.title: Grim Vengeance
programme.desc: The Never Witch's ambitions have darkened, leading her to target the Grim Realm. In an unlikely alliance, the dream chasers must join forces with the Nightmare King and his grimspawn minions.

programme.title: Crown Control
programme.desc: The dream chasers stumble upon the fabled Crown of Control with surprising ease, thanks to an unexpected encounter with the King of the Creatures.

programme.title: The Promised Crown Affair
programme.desc: Izzie has vanished into the dream world, and the dream chasers struggle to maintain normalcy in the waking world while secretly searching for her.

programme.title: Friends Reunite
programme.desc: Olly about how his obsession is affecting their relationships. Olly refuses to see the damage he's causing, but it becomes clear that he's lost touch with what really matters.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh
programme.desc: Yugi must develop new strategies for battle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh
programme.desc: An unseen helper aids Yugi in battle with Seto.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh
programme.desc: Joey engages in individual battle with Rex Raptor.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh
programme.desc: Joey duels valiantly, but Dinosaur Ryuzaki unleashes his secret weapon, Red-Eyes Black Dragon Joey must figure out the secret of Yugi's gift, the Time Wizard card, without Yugi's help.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh
programme.desc: Yugi's classmate, possessed by the Millennium Ring's powers, traps Yugi and friends in a shadow game.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh
programme.sub-title: !: The Light at the End of the Tunnel
programme.desc: Panik cheats Mai of all her Star Chips and Yugi vows to get revenge on him and win them back when Panik's Castle of Dark Illusions enshrouds his monsters in a black mist, Yugi must defeat an enemy he cannot see.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh
programme.desc: Despite his disadvantage, Yugi boldly provokes Panik and tells him that he'll finish him in three turns.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh
programme.desc: Kaiba descends to the Kingdom to face Pegasus powerful dragon cards determine the outcome.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh
programme.desc: When Joey is abducted, he is faced with zombies.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: A bad storm washes away Chompy the Beaver's dam, so he starts chomping on all the wood at Farmer Yumi's Farm! Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to fix the chomped Barn and Fence, but that's just the beginning / Someone has been swiping fish off Cap'n Turbot's boat, so he calls Ryder and the PAW Patrol to help investigate. Using his new SPY GEAR, Chase inspects the boat and heads below deck where he discovers it's a group of pesky Penguins! Now the Pups have to catch the slippery suspects and find a way to get them back to the South Pole! / Adventure Bay's newest Dolphin Pup accidentally swims into a shallow water stream! Now it's up to Ryder and PAW Patrol to get her back into the Bay and with her parents. / An Alien Spaceship crash lands at Farmer Yumi's! Now it's up to the PAW Patrol to help out the stranded little extra-terrestrial by fixing his ship and getting him back to his home planet! / Marshall's new pet frog, Smiley, is going to be in a jumping contest! The only problem is that during a practice run Smiley jumps right into Skye's helicopter and it takes off! Now Skye and the Pups have to save Smiley, and get him to the competition in time! / Jake and Chase go deep cave spelunking when Jake ends up getting his ankle stuck between some fallen rocks! Ryder, Rubble with his new JACKHAMMER, and Marshall with his new FIRST MEDICAL RESPONSE GEAR need to get to the cave right away and save Jake! / Adventure Bay Parade Day goes awry when Alex puts too many balloons on Katie's bathtub float. It literally "floats" away, and with Cali and Chickaletta inside! / Cap'n Turbot and his cousin Francois go deep sea diving to snap a picture of a rare seaslug the only problem is their diving bell ends up stuck, and then the propeller fin breaks at the bottom of the bay! It's PAW Patrol to the rescue, and they have just the right vehicle Zuma's new SUBMARINE!

programme.title: Gaby Time
programme.desc: Triangle, Squares, Circles! Let's move and have some fun making shapes! Dance, sing, and make shapes with your body alongside Ms. Gaby in this fun and interactive dance video! / Join Ms. Gaby on her Turtle Hope Adventure! There's treasure to be found, but we'll have to watch out for hungry crocodiles! Hop to safety on this high energy Gaby Time movement adventure! / Have you ever wanted fly like an airplane? Or Sore like a rocket? Now's your chance! Join Ms. Gaby as she flies through the air at super-sonic speed. Dance along, sing, and imagine flying in this epic music adventure! / It's time to learn your ABC's - Disco dance party style! Join Ms. Gaby for some energetic dancing fun, all while learning your ABC's along the way! Get ready to dance and sing along to this groovy beat! / Ms. Gaby's bedroom floor has turned to quicksand! Hurry and help her clean up her room before she loses all her toys forever! But don't get stuck in the quicksand! And watch out for the Sand Snail! / We've entered the Dinosaur Danger Zone! Join Ms. Gaby on an adventure through dinosaur country. From the Stegosaurus Stomp, to the Pterodactyl Twist. It's time to dance like a dinosaur! Rarrr! / Every birthday needs a song to dance too! Join Ms. Gaby as she sings dances and celebrates a birthday! Maybe it's your birthday? Come dance with us! Happy Birthday to you! May all your wishes come true! / Holy Jumping Jelly Beans! It's time to jump, dance, and sing along with Ms. Gaby and all her Jelly Bean friends! Help Ms. Gaby find all her Jumping Jelly Bean friends!

programme.title: Popa Chubby
programme.sub-title: Popa Chubby - It's A Mighty Hard Road
programme.desc: Popa Chubby, born as Ted Horowitz, is an American blues singer and guitarist, who has become one of the most popular figures of New York's blues scene. Early on in his career he released the album 'Booty and the Beast' (1995), which became one of the 1990s's best-selling blues albums. Chubby describes his own style as "The Stooges meets Buddy Guy, Motörhead meets Muddy Waters, and Jimi Hendrix meets Robert Johnson". As part of the French music festival Blues sur Seine, Chubby and his band played a great blues rock concert, showcasing the artist's powerful and soulful guitar playing. This performance was recorded at Théâtre Simone Signoret on November 8, 2019.

programme.title: Thelonious Monk
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Charlie Parker
programme.desc: The documentary The Story of Jazz is a seamless array of performances, commentary, and compelling historic insights about jazz, zooming in on the cross-cultural influences that produced this constantly evolving and enduring music. Many call jazz the greatest art form of the 20th century. This absorbing weave of sounds, rare film clips, stills and interviews shows how this truly American expression spread to become a universal, musical language, from the New Orleans traditions, stride, swing, boogie woogie, big band, jump band, blues, bebop, Afro-Cuban, cool, and free-form, to jazz vocalists and dancers… Never before have the filmed comments of so many important great jazz artists been assembled for one project, and never before has the history of jazz been told as vividly and with such attention to historic detail.

programme.title: Thelonious Monk
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Stan Getz
programme.desc: Regarded as the greatest instrumental soloist of all-time, Stanley Gayetzky, famously known as Stan Getz emerged as one of the most significant musical forces in the world of jazz post World War II. With his distinctively warm and lyrical tone, Getz is fondly dubbed as ‘The Sound' because of his singularity and musical innovations. His commitment to music is evident from his long body of work that includes over 300 pieces of musical compositions. Ranked among America's top tenor saxophone players, Getz was a gifted saxophonist who could play just about anything on it, a quality that put him on top of the polls. He is accredited for playing some of the best jazz with some of the best jazzmen in the country. However, his personal life was a rollercoaster ride — tumultuous and loused up by abjection, alcohol, addiction and furious flare-ups. This program shows his last public performance, recorded at Munich Philharmonic Hall, Germany on July 18, 1990. Stan Getz (tenor sax) is accompanied by Kenny Barron (piano), Eddie Del Barrio and Frank Zottoli (synthesizers), Alex Blake (bass) and Terri Lyne Carrington (drums).

programme.title: Chet Baker
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Christian Scott, Lawrence Fields, Braxton Cook & Kris Funn
programme.desc: In just a few years, young trumpet player Christian Scott has become synonymous with a new jazz generation. He shakes up the conventions of jazz by taking the genre to new horizons and reaching a wider audience. No doubt, at 33 years old, Christian Scott is already forging his own path. After each record release, he seems even more determined to challenge the rules of jazz with his own avant-garde style. At his 2018 show at La Coopérative de Mai, Christian Scott celebrates 100 years of jazz with the program “The Centennial Trilogy.” Expect a unique performance in an intimate theatre setting, shot in native 4K!

programme.title: Julie Berthollet, Camille Berthollet, Guillaume Vincent & Ensemble Appassionato
programme.sub-title: Berthollet Sisters at Théâtre des Champs-Élysées
programme.desc: For this exceptional recital, recorded in 2019 at the Théâtre des Champs-Élysées, Camille (cello) and Julie Berthollet (violin) are accompanied by pianist Guillaume Vincent and the Ensemble Appassionato under the direction of Mathieu Herzog. The two musical sisters have chosen a repertoire which crosses genres and eras to explore the expressive palette of the violin and cello, from the baroque of Vivaldi to the jazzy notes of Django Reinhardt and Stéphane Grapelli. Among the works on the program are Brahms Hungarian Dances No. 5 and No. 6, Karl Jenkins' Palladio, 'Theme from Forrest Gump' by Alan Silvestri, Schumann's Piano Quintet, Op. 44, The Red Violin by Corigliano, Hungarian Rhapsody, op. 68 by Popper, Minor Swing by Reinhardt/Grappeli and Csárdás by Monti.

programme.title: Philippe Herreweghe, Collegium Vocale Gent, Dorothee Mields & Thomas Hobbs
programme.desc: Philippe Herreweghe conducts his Collegium Vocale Gent in this chamber music program dedicated to the music of J. S. Bach. On the program are Bach's Orchestral Suite No. 4 in D major, BWV 1069 Gott der Herr ist Sonn und Schild, BWV 79 and Missa brevis in G major, BWV 236. The soloists are soprano Dorothee Mields, tenor Thomas Hobbs, countertenor Alex Potter, and bass Peter Kooij. The program continues with a fine selection of Bach's works performed by French lutenist Thomas Dunford. On the program are Suite for lute in G minor, BWV 995 Suite for solo cello in G major (arr. for lute), BWV 1007 and Chaconne from Partita for solo violin in D minor (arr. lute), BWV 1004. This concert was recorded at Concertgebouw Brugge, Belgium, in 2017.

programme.title: Philippe Herreweghe, Collegium Vocale Gent, Dorothee Mields & Thomas Hobbs
programme.desc: Philippe Herreweghe conducts his Collegium Vocale Gent in this chamber music program dedicated to the music of J. S. Bach. On the program are Bach's Orchestral Suite No. 4 in D major, BWV 1069 Gott der Herr ist Sonn und Schild, BWV 79 and Missa brevis in G major, BWV 236. The soloists are soprano Dorothee Mields, tenor Thomas Hobbs, countertenor Alex Potter, and bass Peter Kooij. The program continues with a fine selection of Bach's works performed by French lutenist Thomas Dunford. On the program are Suite for lute in G minor, BWV 995 Suite for solo cello in G major (arr. for lute), BWV 1007 and Chaconne from Partita for solo violin in D minor (arr. lute), BWV 1004. This concert was recorded at Concertgebouw Brugge, Belgium, in 2017.

programme.title: Sir Simon Rattle, Daniel Barenboim & Berliner Philharmoniker
programme.sub-title: Brahms - Piano Concerto No. 1, Op. 15: I. Maestoso
programme.desc: Europakonzert 2004 was held in Athens, Greece. This concert featured the Berliner Philharmoniker performing live at the ancient Herodes Atticus Theatre along with an interesting combination of conductor and soloist - Sir Simon Rattle wielding the baton as pianist Daniel Barenboim plays Johannes Brahms' Piano Concerto No. 1 and Arnold Schoenberg's arrangement of Brahms' Piano Quartet No 1. The Athens concert marked a double première: it was the first Europakonzert under the direction of the new chief conductor, as well as the first time Rattle and Barenboim appeared together. The Odeon of Herodes Atticus, an amphitheatre built in 161 AD in memory of Herodes Atticus' wife, is situated on the slope of the Acropolis. With a seating capacity of at least 5,000 spectators, it was reputed to be the finest theatre in all of Greece.

programme.title: Flying Over Big Sur

programme.title: Flying Over Kauai

programme.title: Flying Over Spanish Islands

This 50-minute 4K aerial film captures Mallorca and the Canary Islands, set to ambient music by Diamans, Electus, and Michael St. Laurent.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland: Part I" provides a soothing aerial journey through eastern Iceland's fjords and valleys, starting at sunrise in Brei_dalsvik. Enjoy views of mists, a waterfall, and the Brei_dals' river, set to nature sounds and music by The Cynic Project, showcasing East Iceland's beauty.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland 2
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland II: Summer in the Golden Circle" presents a serene aerial view of Iceland's south coast, starting at Skogafoss and moving to Vik, with black sand beaches, cliffs, and Vatnajökull glacier. Filmed in 2020, this 1-hour film features local wildlife and immersive music.

programme.title: Rainbow Reef Relaxation 2
programme.desc: Sit back, relax and enjoy the dazzling world of coral reefs in 4K you embark on a journey through some of the most vibrant underwater reefs on our blue planet - including many scenes which no longer look like this due to coral bleaching. From the cinematographer: "The footage for this film was shot over a period of some years in French Polynesia, Micronesia, Indonesia and East Timor. Unfortunately there are not that vibrant anymore today. Coral reefs have suffered from the rise of water temperature, rise in acidity, destructive fishing methods and severe storms caused by climate change." - Peter Schneider. "Rainbow Reef Relaxation" is a 3-hour long, sweeping yet majestic & vibrant underwater journey to the world's most beautiful lagoons, as captured by Nature Relaxation collaborator Peter Schneider (Underwatercam) paired with ambient underwater sounds and brand new ambient music by the Cynic Project. Filmed in High Definition several years ago, thanks to its age this film offers magical glimpses of an underwater world that is bursting with life, color, and beauty.

programme.title: Superbloom Soaring
programme.desc: Soar over one of the most spectacular and unique spectacles of nature - a spring "superbloom" - for one full hour of pure relaxation bliss. Paired with new soothing music by Relax Moods, this film sweeps viewers on a vibrant, gentle flight over the spring poppy fields of California's Antelope Valley and Lake Elsinore wilderness, as witnessed in 2020 & 2019.
